title: orobus venetus var. rigidus
intro: Orobus venetus var. rigidus, also known as rigid orchid or upright broomrape, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orobus venetus var. rigidus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, with some traditional remedies also using it as a poultice or ointment to apply topically.
